--- Page: /events ---
Events — Lucian
0
PRIVATE EVENTS
Ideal for large parties that still feel intimate, Lucian is available for buyouts during our daytime and evening hours.
Our dining room can accommodate up t0 40 guests for a seated, coursed meal and up to 50 guests for a standing reception with passed hors d'oeuvres. Complete your dining experience with pairings selected by our wine director.
Bookings must be confirmed with a deposit at least one month prior to your event date. For more information on private events, please contact our Events Coordinator, Kelly Martin, at
kelly@lucianbooksandwine.com
, or complete the information form.

--- Page: /about ---
About — Lucian
0
SMART WINES, BEAUTIFUL BOOKS, THOUGHTFUL FOOD
Katie Barringer
Co-Owner
Jordan Smelt
Co-Owner,
Beverage
Director
Katie Barringer’s
passion for literature, art, and culture can be found throughout Lucian, from the colorful and extensive book collection to the warmth and sophistication of the dining room. Her expertise is years in the making, cultivated during her years working in both hospitality and the arts before she opened her first bookstore, Atlanta’s beloved Cover Books in 2015. At Lucian, Katie’s book selections reflect a deep appreciation for art, design, food, wine, and visual culture, thoughtfully displayed on shelves that overlook the dining room for guests to peruse and purchase. Katie also plays a pivotal role in spearheading Lucian’s events, which manifest as book launches, curated dinners, and engaging conversations throughout the year.
Jordan Smelt
leads the charge on Lucian’s extensive yet approachable wine list of over 450 bottles, organized by grape variety for easy perusal and discovery, and designed with an editorial eye that makes it reminiscent of a magazine. Originally from Tampa, Jordan has made Atlanta his home for over two decades, during which time he has honed his skills at some of the city’s finest establishments, including Cakes & Ale, Holeman & Finch, and Restaurant Eugene, and served as the original General Manager of wine distribution company Rive Gauche Wine Co. Outside of the restaurant, Jordan cherishes fine wines and time spent with his wife, Katie Barringer, and their three beloved pets.
Jason Paolini
Executive Chef
Inveterate Atlanta chef and Louisiana native
Jason Paolini
brings over 20 years in Atlanta's dining scene to Lucian Books and Wine, where as executive chef he helms a menu of thoughtful, elegant fare perfectly tuned to Lucian’s wine-centric experience. Prior to joining Lucian in January 2022, Jason held several long-term leadership roles at Atlanta institutions, including as executive culinary director for chef Linton Hopkins' Resurgens Hospitality; chef de cuisine for Hopkin's acclaimed Restaurant Eugene and Holeman & Finch; and as executive chef for the Atlanta Botanical Garden's Longleaf Restaurant. In addition to dinner and lunch, Jason is also the culinary force behind Lucian's many special events, collaborating with cookbook authors and wine producers around the country to execute wholly original menus that speak to his creativity and versatility in the kitchen.
